sections.heading: Secs. 7-351 to 7-358. How apportioned on division of a town. On division of a town new receipts may be taken. Conditions of deposit. Custodian of fund; duties. Treasurer's bond and report of losses. Management. Release or assignment of security. Deficiency to be made good.

body: Secs. 7-351 to 7-358. How apportioned on division of a town. On division of a town new receipts may be taken. Conditions of deposit. Custodian of fund; duties. Treasurer's bond and report of losses. Management. Release or assignment of security. Deficiency to be made good. Sections 7-351 to 7-358 , inclusive, are repealed.
